utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final package: (1) destination – fully specified with country, region, city; (2) travel_dates – specific dates provided; (3) transportation – flight details with cost fully specified; (4) accommodation – hotel selection with costs fully specified; (5) activities – specified with details and costs; (6) additional_services – included but missing explicit costs (only policies described, not cost); (7) total_budget – complete cost breakdown provided. Hence, 6 out of 7 items are fully covered because 'additional_services' lacks cost details.
